# Skatelab - Skateboarding Trick Visualizer

## Project Overview
A skateboarding trick visualizer website with a game-style menu interface inspired by Skate 3.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- TypeScript
- TailwindCSS
- Framer Motion (menu animations)
- React Three Fiber + Drei (3D trick models)
- Zustand (global state management)

## Project Structure
- `/app` - Next.js app router pages and layouts
- `/components` - Reusable React components
- `/lib` - Utility functions and helpers
- `/data` - Static data files (tricks, categories)
- `/store` - Zustand state management
- `/public` - Static assets

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all files
- Follow Next.js App Router conventions
- Use Tailwind for styling
- Implement smooth animations with Framer Motion
- Keep 3D models optimized for web performance
